title.ko: 제직 보조 장치; 제직용의 용구; 북(shuttles)
title.en: AUXILIARY WEAVING APPARATUS; WEAVERS' TOOLS; SHUTTLES
Auxiliary apparatus combined with or associated with looms
for treating warp, e.g. cleaning, moistening
for treating weft

title.ko: 직물처리를 위한 것(직기상에서의 파일 절단 D03D 39/24)
title.en: for treating fabric (cutting pile on the loom D03D0039240000)
for slitting fabric
for indicating pattern to weaver

title.ko: 보빈을 직기와 권취장치 사이에 이송 시키는 것(보빈-권취장치 B65)
title.en: transferring bobbins between loom and winding station (bobbin-winding machines B65H)
for leasing warp (leasing in general D02H0009000000)
Apparatus for threading warp stop-motion droppers, healds, or reeds
Apparatus for joining warp ends (knot-tying tools D03J0003000000)
for joining, e.g. tying, a complete series of fresh warp threads to the used warp threads
Measuring length of fabric or number of picks woven
Temples
Mirrors or other arrangements for inspecting loom parts
Weavers' tools, e.g. knot-tying tools
Reed and heald hooks
Shuttle-threading tools (threading devices in shuttles D03J0005200000)

title.ko: 북(스위블 직기용 북 D03D 31/00; 세폭직기용 북 D03D 35/00; 환상직기용 북 D03D 37/00; 셀비지용 북 D03D 47/46)
title.en: Shuttles (swivel shuttles D03D0031000000;shuttles for smallware looms D03D0035000000;circular loom shuttles D03D0037000000;selvedge shuttles D03D0047460000)
Construction of shuttle body
Shuttle tips
Dummy shuttles; Gripper shuttles
Supports for pirns, bobbins, or cops
Pegs or spindles
removable
pivoted
Bobbin clamps, e.g. for automatic bobbin-changing loom shuttles
for coreless cops, i.e. shuttles having no peg or bobbin clamp

title.ko: 북 속의 도사장치(북에 사를 통하게 하기 위한 북과는 별개의 용구 D03J 3/04)
title.en: Devices in shuttles for threading (separate tools for threading shuttles D03J0003040000)
for self-threading, i.e. threading automatically when shuttle is picked
Tension devices
